text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 714797009 (Histologic test (procedure))
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 116147009 (Cytologic test)
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 108257001 (Anatomic pathology procedure)
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 386344002 (Laboratory data interpretation (procedure))
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 5880005 (Clinical examination)
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 363679005 (Imaging (procedure))
  • Include codes from http://snomed.info/sct where concept is-a 250724005 (Tumor marker measurement)

name: CancerDiseaseStatusEvidenceTypeVS
title: Cancer Disease Status Evidence Type Value Set
description: The type of evidence backing up the clinical determination of cancer progression.
